modules.name: Introduction & Environment Setup
modules.description: Setting up the JavaScript sandbox environment and understanding where JavaScript fits in web development.

lessons.title: Course Introduction & JavaScript Sandbox Setup
topics: What is JavaScript and why it matters for web development
Setting up a JavaScript sandbox environment
Running JavaScript in the browser console and VS Code

modules.name: Strings and Numbers
modules.description: Performing basic operations on JavaScript's core data types.

lessons.title: Strings and Numbers
topics: String declaration and common string methods

modules.name: Conditions and Loops
modules.description: Controlling program flow with conditional statements and iteration.

modules.name: Arrays
modules.description: Working with arrays and applying them in a hands-on project.

lessons.title: Arrays & Dice Simulator
topics: Common array methods (push, pop, shift, splice, slice)

modules.name: Functions
modules.description: Creating reusable code blocks with JavaScript functions.

lessons.title: Functions & Refactoring
topics: Code-Along: Refactoring the Dice Simulator with functions

modules.name: DOM Manipulation
modules.description: Using JavaScript to dynamically interact with HTML elements.

lessons.title: Manipulating the DOM
topics: Modifying element content, attributes, and styles
Event listeners and user interaction basics

modules.name: JSON, Objects & Practice
modules.description: Working with JavaScript objects and JSON data format, with hands-on exercises.
